g.text: Find and reclaim wasted disk space on macOS. Zero dependencies.
Space Hog - Find wasted space on your Mac
-h, --help show this help message and exit
--min-size MIN_SIZE Minimum size in MB to report
--cleanup-guide Show detailed cleanup guide with safety info
--stats Show cleanup history and total space saved
--dry-run Preview what would be deleted without actually
--regrowth Show regrowth tracking and cleanup frequency
--memory, -m Analyze RAM usage, autostart items, and background
--essential APP Mark an app as essential
--blacklist APP Mark an app as removable
space-hog --stats # Show cleanup history and savings
space-hog --regrowth # Show regrowth tracking and recommendations
space-hog --memory # Analyze RAM usage and autostart items
space-hog --essential Comet # Mark Comet as essential
space-hog --blacklist Rewind # Mark Rewind as always removable
- Caches: npm, yarn, pnpm, bun, pip, cargo, gradle, maven
- AI tools: Ollama models, Codeium, Gemini CLI, Claude Code
- Docker: images, containers, volumes, VM disk bloat
- Xcode: DerivedData, archives, device symbols, simulators
- Dev dirs: node_modules, .git, venv, DerivedData, Pods
- iOS backups, Mail attachments, Log files
GB NPM cache clean + npx cache
